name: Create a Group Chat imbot.v2.Chat.add - Bitrix24 REST API
snippet: The method imbot.v2.Chat.add creates a new group chat on behalf of the bot. If the owner is not specified, the bot becomes the owner.

name: Chat Bot Chats: Overview of Methods - Bitrix24 REST API
snippet: imbot.chat.add. Creates a new chat. imbot.chat.get. Returns information about the chat. imbot.chat.leave. Executes the chat bot's exit from the specified chat.
